tools.name: synter_onboarding_start
tools.description: Start onboarding - create account and get API key (no auth required)

tools.name: synter_onboarding_status
tools.description: Check onboarding progress - poll until ready (no auth required)

tools.name: pull_google_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Google Ads campaign metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges like weekends, or days for a rolling window

tools.name: pull_meta_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. IM

tools.name: get_ad_readback
tools.description: Proof Pack: read a launched ad's creative + CTA back from the platform API (the source of truth) and verify the CTA against the platform enum and the copy against ad policy (2 credits). Meta supported today; other platforms return a clearly-labeled unsupported result.

tools.name: pull_linkedin_ads_performance
tools.description: Get LinkedIn Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. Pass campaign_group

tools.name: pull_x_ads_performance
tools.description: Get X (Twitter) Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. tools.name: pull_reddit_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Reddit Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. IMPORTANT: If the use

tools.name: pull_microsoft_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Microsoft (Bing) Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. IMPORTANT:

tools.name: pull_tiktok_ads_performance
tools.description: Get TikTok Ads metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. For detailed video en

tools.name: pull_amazon_dsp_performance
tools.description: Pull Amazon DSP campaign performance data (2 credits)

tools.name: pull_amazon_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Amazon Ads (Sponsored Products/Brands/Display) metrics (2 credits). When counting 'live' campaigns, only count campaigns with state=ENABLED AND active ad groups with budget remaining — ARCHIVED campaigns are NOT active. IMPORTANT: If the user has multiple Amazon Ads accounts connected, you MUST

tools.name: pull_pinterest_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Pinterest Ads metrics (2 credits). IMPORTANT: If the user has multiple Pinterest ad accounts connected, you MUST ask which account to use BEFORE calling this tool — pass account_name to select it.

tools.name: pull_snap_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Snapchat Ads metrics (2 credits). Use account_name to specify which account when multiple are connected.

tools.name: pull_spotify_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Spotify Ads metrics (2 credits). Use account_name to specify which account when multiple are connected.

tools.name: pull_openai_ads_performance
tools.description: Get OpenAI Ads metrics (2 credits). Pulls insights from the OpenAI Ads API. Optional scope: campaign_id, ad_group_id, or ad_id to scope the report. Defaults to the selected scope's natural aggregation level; unscoped defaults to ad_account.

tools.name: pull_trade_desk_performance
tools.description: Get The Trade Desk metrics (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. Use account_name to specify which account when multiple are connected.

tools.name: pull_freewheel_performance
tools.description: Get FreeWheel Buyer Cloud (Beeswax) metrics (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_days, last_14_days, last_30_days, last_90_days), start_date/end_date (YYYY-MM-DD) for custom ranges, or days for a rolling window. Use account_name to specify which account when multiple

tools.name: reconcile_platforms
tools.description: Cross-platform reconciliation MVP — compares Google Ads ↔ Trade Desk totals for a date range, returns normalized per-platform metrics, discrepancies, and deterministic likely-cause explanations (3 credits). Read-only. Date range capped to 92 days. SYN-2480.

tools.name: pull_dv360_performance
tools.description: Get Display & Video 360 (DV360) metrics (2 credits). Use account_name to specify which account when multiple are connected.

tools.name: pull_walmart_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Walmart Connect Advertising metrics (2 credits). Returns impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, and ROAS per campaign.

tools.name: pull_instacart_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Instacart Ads metrics (2 credits). Returns impressions, clicks, spend, attributed orders, and attributed sales per campaign.

tools.name: pull_target_roundel_performance
tools.description: Get Target Roundel retail media metrics (2 credits). Returns impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, and revenue per campaign.

tools.name: pull_criteo_ads_performance
tools.description: Get Criteo Commerce Media metrics (2 credits). Returns displays, clicks, cost, conversions, and revenue per campaign.

tools.name: tiktok_ads_get_insights
tools.description: Get TikTok Ads performance report with video metrics (2 credits). Returns spend, impressions, clicks, CTR, conversions, CPA, ROAS, and TikTok-specific video engagement metrics per campaign/adgroup/ad.

tools.name: tiktok_ads_get_adgroup
tools.description: Get full TikTok ad group configuration (free). Returns targeting, budget, bid, pixel, optimization goal, languages, locations, age groups, identity.

tools.name: tiktok_ads_list_adgroups
tools.description: List all TikTok ad groups, optionally filtered by campaign (free). Returns ID, name, status, budget, bid, optimization goal.

tools.name: tiktok_ads_list_ads
tools.description: List all TikTok ads, optionally filtered by ad group (free). Returns ad_id, ad_name, adgroup_id, campaign_id, status, ad_format.

tools.name: tiktok_ads_update_adgroup
tools.description: Update a TikTok ad group: status, budget, locations, age targeting, bid, languages, audiences, optimization goal, pixel tracking (5 credits)

tools.name: tiktok_ads_get_campaign
tools.description: Get full TikTok campaign configuration by ID (free). Returns name, objective, budget, status, timestamps.

tools.name: list_gtm_containers
tools.description: List Google Tag Manager accounts and containers for the connected GTM user (2 credits). Returns each account's id/name and its containers' id/name/publicId.

tools.name: list_gtm_tags
tools.description: List the tags in a GTM container (2 credits). Returns tag summaries: tagId, name, type, paused. Pass account_id/container_id, or rely on the connection's defaults.

tools.name: get_gtm_tag
tools.description: Get the full definition of one GTM tag (2 credits), including its parameters (the html body for Custom HTML tags) and firing triggers.

tools.name: update_gtm_tag_html
tools.description: Replace the HTML body of an existing GTM Custom HTML tag (5 credits). MODIFIES LIVE SITE TRACKING once the container is published. Only type 'html' tags are allowed; the change stays in the workspace until publish_gtm_container runs.

tools.name: publish_gtm_container
tools.description: Publish a GTM container — creates a version from the default workspace and publishes it (5 credits). PUSHES ALL WORKSPACE CHANGES LIVE to the site's tracking immediately. Approval-gated.

tools.name: run_gaql_query
tools.description: Execute a Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) query (2 credits). Use account_name to specify which account when multiple are connected.

tools.name: ga4_list_properties
tools.description: List your Google Analytics 4 properties (free)

tools.name: ga4_run_report
tools.description: Run a Google Analytics 4 report (free). Pass property_id to query a specific GA4 property instead of the connection default.

tools.name: ga4_list_conversions
tools.description: List GA4 conversion events (free). Pass property_id to query a specific GA4 property instead of the connection default.

tools.name: verify_pixel_ownership
tools.description: Cross-validate that the pixel/tag IDs on a landing page belong to the connected ad account. Detects wrong-pixel installs, domain registration gaps, and CAPI mismatches. Free — no credits.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List campaigns for any ad platform (1 credit)

tools.name: pause_campaign
tools.description: Pause a campaign on any ad platform (2 credits)

tools.name: enable_campaign
tools.description: Enable/resume a paused campaign on any ad platform (2 credits)

tools.name: update_campaign_budget
tools.description: Update a campaign's daily budget (5 credits)

tools.name: list_connected_accounts
tools.description: See ALL connected accounts: ad platforms, analytics (GA4, PostHog), CRM (HubSpot, Attio), and more (free)

tools.name: verify_platform_accounts
tools.description: Verify which ad account each platform's pull tools would use by default, with recent activity per connected account. Flags when the default account is dormant while a sibling account has spend (free). Call this before pull_*_performance when a platform has multiple accounts or returns suspicious zer

tools.name: list_available_scripts
tools.description: See all available PPC scripts (free)

tools.name: create_google_doc
tools.description: Create a Google Doc from markdown or HTML content (5 credits)

tools.name: publish_to_github
tools.description: Publish a markdown blog post to a connected GitHub repo: commit <content_path>/<slug>.md and open a PR (which triggers the site's deploy). Free.

tools.name: create_google_sheet
tools.description: Create a Google Sheet from tabular data (5 credits)

tools.name: read_google_sheet
tools.description: Read tabular data (e.g. a media plan / campaign brief) from a connected Google Sheet (free)

tools.name: update_google_sheet
tools.description: Write values (e.g. campaign IDs / status / spend) back into a range of an existing Google Sheet (2 credits)

tools.name: create_landing_page
tools.description: Generate an AI landing page hosted on your custom domain (135 credits)

tools.name: publish_landing_page
tools.description: Publish a landing page draft, making it live at syntermedia.ai/lp/{slug} (free)

tools.name: update_landing_page_html
tools.description: Update the HTML content of an existing landing page without AI regeneration (free). Use this to patch copy, add logos, or tweak layout after reviewing a draft.

tools.name: upload_landing_page_html
tools.description: Upload raw HTML as a new landing-page draft (no AI generation). Use to import an exported .html file or hand-written markup (embedded forms, Cal.com embeds, thank-you pages all supported). Then publish_landing_page and attach it to an ad campaign. Free.

tools.name: setup_custom_domain
tools.description: Assign a custom domain (e.g. go.acme.com) to a published landing page. Requires Growth plan or higher. Free — no credits charged.

tools.name: verify_custom_domain
tools.description: Check if DNS is configured for a landing page's custom domain. Free — no credits charged.

tools.name: execute
tools.description: Execute any Synter action: create campaigns, generate AI images/videos, upload to YouTube, manage GTM/GA4, analyze competitors, and more. SAFE BY DEFAULT: dry_run defaults to true (validation only, nothing runs) — pass dry_run=false to actually execute. Dry-run responses include target_readback (res

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Check the status of an async job (e.g. audience sync). Returns job status, result on success, or error on failure. Free - no credits charged.

tools.name: sync_audience
tools.description: Upload audience data (emails, phones, MAIDs, companies, a public CSV URL, or a private artifact id) to ad platforms. Supports inline pre-hashed identifiers, artifact-id references for >1k entries, and batch mode for Clay.com row-by-row workflows (staging is free, upload costs 10 credits — only on su

tools.name: build_abm_audience
tools.description: [INTERNAL — Synter staff only] Build an ad-platform Custom Audience from RevenueBase decision-maker emails for a list of target company domains. Pulls valid emails from the RevenueBase Snowflake share, SHA-256 hashes locally, uploads to the requested platform (LINKEDIN, META, GOOGLE, REDDIT, X, MICR

tools.name: stage_audience_artifact
tools.description: Stage a hashed-PII payload (newline-delimited identifiers) in Synter's private artifact store and return an opaque artifact_id. Pass that id to sync_audience via *_artifact_id parameters. FREE — no credits charged. Use this instead of pasting hashed identifiers as inline tool args when you have more

tools.name: create_campaign_for_audience
tools.description: Create a campaign targeting an existing audience (200 credits — campaign launch)

tools.name: list_audiences
tools.description: List existing audiences on an ad platform (1 credit)

tools.name: delete_audience
tools.description: Delete a custom/matched audience from an ad platform by audience_id. Use to clean up stale or errored (e.g. NOT_ENOUGH_MATCHES) audiences. Reddit supported today. This is irreversible.

tools.name: pull_linkedin_company_engagement
tools.description: Pull LinkedIn Ads Company Engagement report — shows which companies have seen your ads and how engaged they are (2 credits)

tools.name: get_credit_balance
tools.description: Check your credit balance and pricing (free)

tools.name: set_spend_alert
tools.description: Set a weekly ad spend alert — notifies via email, Slack, SMS, and/or WhatsApp when total spend exceeds threshold (free)

tools.name: create_autonomous_schedule
tools.description: Create an autonomous agent schedule that runs a Synter skill on a cron cadence (e.g. a budget-pacing / campaign-health monitor). Defaults to a read-only cross-platform pacing monitor every 4 hours that alerts via Slack and never moves money. Pass skill_slug + cron_expression to schedule any autonomo

tools.name: list_autonomous_schedules
tools.description: List the workspace's autonomous agent schedules (pacing/health monitors, budget optimizers) with cadence, approval mode, next run, and latest run status (free).

tools.name: get_connection_status
tools.description: Check ALL platform connections: ad platforms, analytics (GA4, PostHog), CRM (HubSpot, Attio), and more (free)

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available Synter skills with descriptions (free)

tools.name: load_skill
tools.description: Load detailed instructions for a specific skill (free)

tools.name: growth_discover
tools.description: Discover ICP prospects from RevenueBase (verified B2B contacts for ad audiences) or hiring companies via Sumble (outreach), plus listicle/podcast placements. (5 credits)

tools.name: growth_enrich
tools.description: Enrich a domain with competitive intelligence — SpyFu PPC data, BuiltWith tech stack, Hunter emails, Firecrawl headline. (5 credits)

tools.name: growth_run_pipeline
tools.description: Run the full growth pipeline — discover leads, enrich, generate outreach. (10 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_account_usage
tools.description: BuiltWith account capability and usage snapshot — plan limits, rate limits, credit usage. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_domain_lookup
tools.description: BuiltWith domain tech stack lookup — ad pixels, CRM, analytics, CMS/ecommerce tools, spend/meta. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_recent_changes
tools.description: BuiltWith Change API — recent technology additions/removals for domains, with business context. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_trust
tools.description: BuiltWith Trust API — domain trust, ecommerce/payment, parked/status, spend and live-tech signals. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_find_sites
tools.description: Find websites by BuiltWith technology, natural language audience, or keyword search. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_product_search
tools.description: BuiltWith Product API — ecommerce shops and product listings matching a product query. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_company_to_url
tools.description: BuiltWith Company to URL API — resolve company names to candidate website domains. (2 credits)

tools.name: builtwith_keywords
tools.description: BuiltWith Keywords API — keywords associated with a website domain. (2 credits)

tools.name: forecast_campaign
tools.description: Forecast campaign KPIs (spend, CPA, ROAS, clicks, conversions) for 7-30 days with confidence intervals (2 credits)

tools.name: optimize_budget
tools.description: Cross-channel budget allocation using diminishing returns modeling (5 credits)

tools.name: test_creatives
tools.description: Start or check a multi-armed bandit creative experiment using Thompson sampling (3 credits)

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an AI image for ad creatives using Imagen 4, Flux, or Stable Diffusion.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate an AI video ad using Veo, Runway, or Luma. Great for YouTube and social ads.

tools.name: generate_image_ad
tools.description: Generate display/social ad images. Use mode='system-graphic' for bold text-heavy creatives (requires headline). AI mode (default) for photo/illustration backgrounds. Auto-sizes for target platform (80 credits)

tools.name: generate_video_ad
tools.description: Generate AI video ads using Veo, Luma, Runway, or HeyGen with creative concept templates (130–1100 credits)

tools.name: generate_ugc_ad
tools.description: Generate UGC-style video ads with AI avatars (fal Aurora / HeyGen) (900 credits)

tools.name: generate_text_ad
tools.description: Generate text ad copy (headlines, descriptions, CTAs) for any platform using Claude (5 credits)

tools.name: generate_voice_ad
tools.description: Generate a voice-over ad with an AI avatar speaking your script (fal Aurora / HeyGen) (900 credits)

tools.name: list_creative_assets
tools.description: List generated creative assets (images and videos) from your artifact library (free)

tools.name: upload_creative
tools.description: Upload a generated creative asset to an ad platform and attach it to a campaign (5 credits)

tools.name: attach_audience
tools.description: Attach (or replace/remove) a matched audience on an EXISTING campaign's targeting (5 credits). LinkedIn supported today.

tools.name: get_attribution
tools.description: Multi-touch attribution analysis using Markov chains (5 credits)

tools.name: measure_incrementality
tools.description: Measure incremental ad impact via geo-lift or synthetic control (10 credits)

tools.name: build_lookalike_audience
tools.description: Build ML-based lookalike audience from seed customers (10 credits)

tools.name: create_campaign_plan
tools.description: Create or update a campaign launch plan (5 credits). Use plan_key for idempotency.

tools.name: upsert_plan_entity
tools.description: Add or update an entity (campaign, ad, tweet, go_link, etc.) within a campaign plan (2 credits).

tools.name: publish_plan_document
tools.description: Publish a campaign plan for review, generating a shareable URL (2 credits).

tools.name: execute_campaign_plan
tools.description: Launch an approved campaign plan — activates all entities across platforms in dependency order (10 credits).

tools.name: get_plan_execution
tools.description: Get execution status and per-entity step results for a campaign plan launch (free).

tools.name: setup_google_ads_trial_funnel
tools.description: Set up a complete Google Ads trial acquisition funnel: branded Search campaign (maximize clicks, builds conversion history), PMax campaign (maximize conversions), and Display retargeting campaign — all pointing to a Synter-hosted landing page. Requires an active Google Ads connection. (15 credits)

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a document in the Campaign IDE editor (free). Perfect for reports, audits, strategy docs, and plans that can be collaboratively edited.

tools.name: get_campaign_plan
tools.description: Fetch a campaign plan with its entities, budgets, desired states, and review/execution status (free).

tools.name: delete_document
tools.description: Delete a Campaign IDE document by id or uuid (e.g. to remove a stale or duplicate doc). Only deletes documents you own.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel via the Synter bot. channel = a channel ID (Cxxxx) or #name. The bot can only post to channels it's a member of.

tools.name: find_audience_signals
tools.description: Find audience signals/clusters in Watt Data from a natural-language description (e.g. 'RevOps leaders at B2B SaaS companies using Salesforce'). Returns matching semantic clusters to use as targeting signals. Requires WATTDATA_API_KEY.

tools.name: get_pixel_destinations
tools.description: List Synter Pixel sites and their CAPI event-forwarding destinations for the active workspace. Shows platform, enabled/disabled state, and configured IDs. Free — no credits.

tools.name: configure_pixel_destination
tools.description: Create or update a Synter Pixel CAPI event-forwarding destination. Sets the platform-specific IDs needed to fan out conversion events server-side. Supports Google (customer_id + conversion_action_id), Meta/Reddit (pixel_id), LinkedIn (conversion_rule_id), TikTok (pixel_code), and Snapchat. Use actio

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "pull_google_ads_performance" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get Google Ads campaign metrics — impressions, clicks, spend, conversions per campaign (2 credits). Date window: date_range preset (today, yesterday, last_7_day…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "execute" is 664 chars, far longer than this server's median (119). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Execute any Synter action: create campaigns, generate AI images/videos, upload to YouTube, manage GTM/GA4, analyze competitors, and more. SAFE BY DEFAULT: dry_r…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "execute" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Execute any Synter action: create campaigns, generate AI images/videos, upload to YouTube, manage GTM/GA4, analyze competitors, and more. SAFE BY DEFAULT: dry_r…

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "execute" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "build_abm_audience" references sensitive artifacts (env var). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: [INTERNAL — Synter staff only] Build an ad-platform Custom Audience from RevenueBase decision-maker emails for a list of target company domains. Pulls valid ema…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "find_audience_signals" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Find audience signals/clusters in Watt Data from a natural-language description (e.g. 'RevOps leaders at B2B SaaS companies using Salesforce'). Returns matching…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.syntermedia.ai" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_gtm_tag, publish_to_github, build_abm_audience, get_campaign_plan · Private data: synter_onboarding_start, upload_landing_page_html, sync_audience, build_abm_audience, stage_audience_artifact, growth_discover, publish_plan_document, create_document, delete_document · Public sink: publish_gtm_container, publish_to_github, publish_landing_page, upload_landing_page_html, execute, sync_audience, build_abm_audience, set_spend_alert, upload_creative, upsert_plan_entity, publish_plan_document, send_slack_message · Destructive: run_gaql_query, ga4_run_report, execute, delete_audience, list_autonomous_schedules, growth_run_pipeline, attach_audience, execute_campaign_plan, delete_document.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_gtm_tag, publish_to_github, build_abm_audience, get_campaign_plan · Private data: synter_onboarding_start, upload_landing_page_html, sync_audience, build_abm_audience, stage_audience_artifact, growth_discover, publish_plan_document, create_document, delete_document · Public sink: publish_gtm_container, publish_to_github, publish_landing_page, upload_landing_page_html, execute, sync_audience, build_abm_audience, set_spend_alert, upload_creative, upsert_plan_entity, publish_plan_document, send_slack_message · Destructive: run_gaql_query, ga4_run_report, execute, delete_audience, list_autonomous_schedules, growth_run_pipeline, attach_audience, execute_campaign_plan, delete_document

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
